candidate_problems.text: Can dependency density, interchangeable redundancy, and failure under nearby alternatives be operationalized into a test that distinguishes hard-to-vary explanations from merely coherent narratives?
In what kinds of explanations do cross-domain reach and low degrees of freedom come apart, producing accounts that are tightly coupled locally but weak globally?
Can an AI system systematically discover load-bearing explanatory parts by structured assumption-variation better than human evaluators, and on what benchmark cases?
